stages.name: Search & Discover
stages.description: The trigger event hits — a storm, a tripping breaker, an EV delivery date, an 8pm outage, a GC handoff, a tenant complaint. The persona goes to Google, an AI platform, or a peer recommendation channel searching for relevant electrical services. Local Services Ad position, organic SEO ranking, AI Overview presence, and local-pack visibility determine who gets seen first.

stages.name: Evaluate & Compare
stages.description: Residential personas pull up 2–3 options on mobile, scan reviews, check the BBB rating, look for licensure / insurance badges, and compare proposals. Cynthia decides in under 5 minutes. Heather & Mark / Daniel take 1–3 weeks. Michael trusts a GC referral but cross-checks via Houzz project portfolios. Carla takes 90+ days — she wants references, COI, and a multi-property RFP. Reputation depth, schema completeness, and the speed of the first call response win or lose the shortlist.

stages.name: Validate & Decide
stages.description: Before booking, every persona cross-references — Heather & Mark and Daniel ask neighbors on Nextdoor and check Facebook groups, Vanessa watches YouTube and TikTok install walkthroughs, Michael verifies the project portfolio, Carla calls 2–3 commercial references. Increasingly all six personas also ask AI platforms for second opinions. The brand that shows up in every one of those validation surfaces wins the booking.
